title: Extract Product Codes
scenario: Write a SQL query that extracts product codes from a database table named 'products'. The table should have a column named 'code' and another column named 'name'. The query should return a list of product codes where the name contains the word 'electronics'. Ensure the query is optimized and has proper syntax.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the query adheres to the constraints provided.
Verify if the SQL query has proper syntax and is free of errors.
Check if the query correctly extracts the product codes from the database table and returns the correct results.
